appraisal_events.evidence: « un morceau de verre prodigieusement grossissant … lui montrait ce seul homme si grand au milieu des autres, tout petits, comme ce Jupiter… »; Mme de Villeparisis paraît « beaucoup plus renseignée » sur ses déplacements et goûts (Greco, Tolède).
appraisal_events.explanation: The narrator presents the singularly attentive way in which Mme de Villeparisis sees the narrator's father, making him appear tall and distinct among others; this privileged focus functions as a local elevation of his figure.

status_effects.explanation: The particular consideration of a great lady for him (detailed information, enlarged gaze) distinguishes him and elevates him locally above the 'midst of others'.
